subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! In the previous post to Jináb-i-Mírzá 'Atá'u'lláh Khán and Jináb-i-Muhammad Khán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان در پوسته پیش بجناب میرزا عطاء الله خان و جناب محمد خان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
